eventSummary:
SafeYield Token ($SYLD) on Ethereum was identified as a honeypot contract. The token's smart contract contains a hidden function that prevents holders from selling after purchase. Over 340 wallets have been affected, with approximately $1.2M in trapped funds. The contract deployer has been linked to three previous honeypot deployments.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/example/status/1234567890
- https://etherscan.io/address/0xdead

MoonRocket Finance ($MROCK) conducted a rug pull on BNB Chain, draining $3.8M from the liquidity pool. The team deleted all social media accounts within minutes of the drain. The project had promoted itself through paid Telegram influencers and fake audit certificates.
Sources:
- https://bscscan.com/tx/0xabcd
- https://cointelegraph.com/news/moonrocket-rugpull

EliteVault Protocol has been flagged as a potential Ponzi scheme by multiple blockchain analysts. The protocol promises 2% daily returns on staked tokens, funded entirely by new depositor inflows. Smart contract analysis shows no legitimate yield-generating mechanism. Total value locked exceeds $5M.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/analyst/status/9876543210

PepeGold ($PEPEG) experienced a coordinated pump-and-dump scheme. On-chain analysis reveals a cluster of 15 wallets accumulated 40% of supply at launch, orchestrated a social media hype campaign, then dumped holdings within a 3-hour window causing an 89% price crash. Estimated retail losses: $800K.
Sources:
- https://dexscreener.com/ethereum/pepeg

MetaSwap DEX, a decentralized exchange on Arbitrum, was found to contain a hidden admin function allowing the contract owner to freeze user funds and redirect swaps to a controlled wallet. The vulnerability was discovered by independent auditors after users reported failed withdrawals.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/auditor/status/111222333

A phishing campaign impersonating a legitimate Solana airdrop has been distributing malicious links through Twitter and Discord. Victims who connect their wallets are prompted to sign a transaction that drains all SPL tokens. At least 200 wallets have been compromised with estimated losses of $150K.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/solana_security/status/444555666

NovaChain Labs raised $2.1M in a token presale for a supposed Layer 2 scaling solution. Investigation reveals the team identities are fabricated, the whitepaper is plagiarized from an existing project, and the contract deployer address has links to a known scam network. The presale contract has no refund mechanism.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/chaindetective/status/777888999

YieldFarm Pro on Polygon was identified as having a mint function accessible only to the deployer, allowing unlimited token creation. The deployer has already minted 500M additional tokens and begun selling into the liquidity pool. Token price has dropped 70% in the last 24 hours.
Sources:
- https://polygonscan.com/address/0xbeef

CryptoGains Academy, operating through Telegram and a custom web platform, has been running a token-based referral scheme with guaranteed 5% weekly returns. Analysis of on-chain flows confirms the classic Ponzi structure: new investor deposits fund older investor withdrawals. Over 1,200 participants have been identified.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/scamalert/status/333444555

BullBear Token ($BBT) on Base chain saw suspicious trading patterns consistent with a pump-and-dump. Trading volume spiked 4000% within 2 hours driven by bot activity, followed by a 94% crash. The top 5 wallets sold their entire holdings at the peak. Low-severity due to small market cap ($45K).
Sources:
- https://basescan.org/token/bbt
